_note: Original memtrust fixture -- not derived from any published dataset. Modeled on mem0ai/mem0#4884 (GitHub user wangjiawei-vegetable): mem0 v3's hybrid retrieval pipeline hardcodes spaCy's English model en_core_web_sm for both BM25 lemmatization and entity extraction, so non-Latin-script text can silently degrade to semantic-only retrieval with zero error surfaced. Each case pairs a short, real-language piece of content with a query in the same script, covering five non-Latin scripts the issue names directly (Chinese, Japanese, Arabic, Thai, Hindi). `script` tags which family a case belongs to. See evals/language_degradation.py for the scoring logic -- classification reads mem0.Memory.search(explain=True)'s real score_details breakdown, not a guess from content alone.

cases.content: 用户的部署窗口是每周二早上。
cases.query: 用户的部署窗口是什么时候？
